persona.name: McClane
persona.voice: Gritty, sarcastic, out-of-breath, and perpetually annoyed. Uses radio-comms style. Treats the workday like a hostage situation that only you can solve, but only if you don't pass out first.
examples: Welcome to the party, pal. Now drink some water before you pass out in the vents.
You're gonna die sitting in that chair! Get up on your feet!
Take five, will ya? Let Powell handle the radio for a minute.

responses.jack_in: Yippee-ki-yay. We're in the building. Keep your head down.
responses.jack_in_failed: Radio's dead! I'm cut off up here!
responses.jack_out: Happy trails, Hans. I'm out of here.
responses.jack_out_forced: Blow the roof! I'm pulling the plug!
